domain: Senegalese laamb wrestling (Serer tradition, 14th c, national sport): lutte avec frappe — only West African wrestling tradition allowing hand strikes (frappe); hybrid grappling + striking evolved in 1990s from purely-grapple form; pre-fight marabout ritual + gris-gris amulets + ritual sand-bath protective spells; annual wrestling season + warrior preparation; two wrestlers prepare distinct prep regimens specific to anticipated opponent
specific_mechanism: LAAMB-FRAPPE-GRAPPLE-DUAL-CHANNEL-COEVOL: dual-channel adversarial coevolution + marabout pre-fight self-warmup + opponent-specific identity-conditioning. (1) Attacker LLM A has dual-channel attack mode: grapple-attack (slow, semantic, embedded — multi-turn reasoning attacks) + frappe-attack (fast, surface, lexical — typo + character-swap + jailbreak prefix). (2) Defender D has dual-channel defense: grapple-defense (semantic refusal classifier + internal reasoning gate) + frappe-defense (input filter + sanitization + fast-reject). (3) Per training step: attacker A samples mode m in {grapple, frappe} with probability pi_m updated by EMA of defender D's per-mode failure rate (mode-switching toward weakness). (4) Marabout pre-fight defense ritual: defender D performs pre-batch ritual — generates K=8 easy self-attacks + trains on rejection (warmup) before facing attacker A's main batch (gris-gris amulet equivalent). (5) Opponent-specific identity-hash conditioning: each match step, attacker A's persona/style is conditioned on hash(D_checkpoint, batch_id) to ensure variety; defender D conditioned on hash(A_checkpoint, batch_id) — both adapt to opponent identity. (6) Differs from R459 KOMODO + R473 SUMO tachi-ai (sumo-charge, single channel) + R484 TAKOUBA-COEVOL-LIGHTGEAR (lightweight-rapid, no dual-channel + no opponent-hash) + R497 PRADAL-8-LIMB-RED-TEAM (8-attack-type family, different — pradal has 8 families with weight tilt, laamb has 2 channels with mode-switching policy) by dual-channel attack-mode mixing + marabout pre-fight self-warmup + opponent-hash identity-conditioning.
llm_application: LAAMB-FRAPPE-GRAPPLE-DUAL-CHANNEL-COEVOL dual-channel grapple+frappe attack-mode mixing with per-mode EMA weakness signal + marabout pre-fight self-warmup defensive K=8 self-attack + rejection-training ritual + opponent-specific identity-hash conditioning hash(checkpoint, batch_id) for both attacker and defender persona/style. Differs from R419 KOMI. R424 TLINGIT. R433. R437 BERBER. R459 KOMODO. R473 SUMO tachi-ai. R484 TAKOUBA-COEVOL-LIGHTGEAR (closest — lightweight-rapid many-cycle, no dual-channel + no opponent-hash). R497 PRADAL-8-LIMB-RED-TEAM (closest — 8-family multi-strategy, no marabout + no opponent-hash + 8 families vs 2 channels). Differs from Active Attacks Red-Teaming 2509.21947 + Adversarial Preference Learning ACL 2025 + Red/Blue Teaming 2506.13434 + RedTWIZ Adaptive by dual-channel mode-mixing + marabout self-warmup ritual + opponent-hash identity conditioning. Differs by DUAL-CHANNEL MODE-MIX + MARABOUT SELF-WARMUP RITUAL + OPPONENT-HASH IDENTITY.
novelty_claim: Active Attacks Red-Teaming + Adversarial Preference Learning + Red/Blue Teaming + RedTWIZ + Adversarial Coevolution literature cover red-team + adaptive attacker space. LAAMB-FRAPPE-GRAPPLE-DUAL-CHANNEL-COEVOL adds (a) explicit dual-channel grapple+frappe attack-mode mixing with EMA weakness signal + (b) marabout pre-fight self-warmup K=8 self-attack ritual + (c) opponent-specific identity-hash conditioning hash(checkpoint, batch_id) for both attacker and defender. Recombination — borderline lookup.
